title: Follow Steve: Half-Life mod
description: This mod introduces creatures and blocks from the Half-Life series and fan-made expansions. Explore the Xen dimension and fight new enemies!
body:
![Vortigaunt and Antlion cave](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/da5792de99465d6a15b1600fd19f69a90567d38c.png)This mod introduces creatures and blocks from the Half-Life series and fan-made expansions. Explore the Xen dimension and fight new enemies!

Disclaimer: Some sound effects and music tracks are property of Valve Corporation.
